title: Grounding Schema
description: This schema defines the Grounding part of a Service Description.

binding.description: A named collection of protocols and data formats used in transmitting messages defined by the associated interface.

protocol.description: Document prescribing formal rules for the coordination of interacting components.

interface.description: Name of the interface associated with the given binding as provided in the Model section.

endpoint.description: A network address at which the service may be accessed.
